items.name: Tikka Trio

categories.name: Mandala Fusion Menu - East Meets West Momo

items.name: Alfredo Momo
items.description: Signature Dish. Soft steamed momo tossed in a rich, creamy Alfredo sauce made with butter, garlic, and cheese. A fusion twist blending Nepali dumplings with classic Italian flavour, smooth, cheesy, and absolutely indulgent. Includes 4pc momo and noodles

items.name: Pesto Basilic Momo
items.description: Steamed momo tossed in fresh basil pesto sauce, rich, herby, and full of flavor. A perfect fusion of Nepali and Italian tastes. Includes 4pc momo and noodles
